nws.name: Overnight
nws.detailedForecast: Rain after 4am. Cloudy, with a low around 34. North northwest wind around 17 mph, with gusts as high as 26 mph. Chance of precipitation is 80%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

nws.name: Wednesday
nws.shortForecast: Rain And Snow Likely then Partly Sunny
nws.detailedForecast: Rain and snow likely before 10am. Partly sunny, with a high near 47. North northwest wind 17 to 22 mph, with gusts as high as 31 mph. Chance of precipitation is 70%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

nws.detailedForecast: Mostly clear, with a low around 28. West southwest wind 6 to 15 mph, with gusts as high as 21 mph.
